notes: AWS us-east-1 mapped to United States country-level hydrology and a thermal-mixed grid profile.
AWS us-east-2 mapped to United States country-level hydrology and a thermal-mixed grid profile.
AWS us-west-1 uses a gas-dominant profile to reflect California-style thermal balancing in the first pass bundle.
AWS us-west-2 mapped to a renewables-heavy profile for BPA-style hydro and wind heavy supply.
GCP us-central1 uses a thermal-mixed US grid profile.
GCP us-east4 uses a thermal-mixed US grid profile.
GCP us-west1 uses a renewables-heavy profile for BPA-style supply.
Azure eastus uses a thermal-mixed US grid profile.
Azure eastus2 uses a thermal-mixed US grid profile.
Azure westus2 uses a renewables-heavy US West profile.
Azure centralus uses a thermal-mixed US grid profile.
Azure southcentralus uses a gas-dominant US grid profile.
AWS eu-west-1 mapped to Ireland and a gas-dominant European profile.
AWS eu-west-2 mapped to Great Britain and a gas-dominant European profile.
AWS eu-central-1 mapped to Germany and a thermal-mixed profile.
AWS eu-north-1 mapped to Sweden and a renewables-heavy Nordic profile.
AWS ap-southeast-1 mapped to Singapore and a gas-dominant profile.
AWS ap-northeast-1 mapped to Japan and a gas-dominant profile.
AWS ap-south-1 mapped to India and a coal-heavy profile.
GCP europe-west1 mapped to Belgium and a nuclear-heavy profile.
GCP europe-north1 mapped to Finland and a renewables-heavy Nordic profile.
Azure northeurope mapped to Ireland and a gas-dominant profile.
Azure norwayeast mapped to Norway and a renewables-heavy Nordic profile.
Azure uksouth mapped to Great Britain and a gas-dominant profile.
Routing test region FR mapped to France and a nuclear-heavy profile.
Routing test region DE mapped to Germany and a thermal-mixed profile.
Routing test region GB mapped to Great Britain and a gas-dominant profile.
Routing test region US-CAL-CISO uses the United States country baseline and a gas-dominant California profile.
